name: Black-Eyed Peas & Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 head of Radicchio OR 1 head of Boston lettuce (for garnish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salad a day ahead and store in the refrigerator.
2. Allow it to come to room temperature before serving.
3. Cook the rice and black-eyed peas in advance.
4. To make the vinaigrette, whisk together mustard, salt, pepper, and vinegar until dissolved.
5. Slowly drizzle in the olive oil while continuing to whisk.
6. Toss the black-eyed peas and rice with the vinaigrette until everything is nicely coated.
7. Mix in the onion, garlic, carrot, and chives or parsley.
8. Serve surrounded by radicchio or lettuce.
